# Summary

<!-- One or two sentences on what this changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New template / stack
- [ ] Refactor (no user-visible behaviour change)
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:run` passes
- [ ] `pnpm validate:templates` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] If user-visible: included a changeset (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] If a new template: covered by at least one e2e in `tests/scaffold.e2e.test.ts`
- [ ] If a new placeholder token: registered in `src/placeholders.ts`

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to: tricky logic, manual verification done, breaking changes. -->
